case_title: NEWSOM, BRENNAN J. VS YAWITZ, SHIRLEY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWSOM, BRENNAN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAWITZ, SHIRLEY $1,356.67 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,376.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
